{{CargoOrgan
|name=Death Claw
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10860
|idx=67
|description=The huge claw was of a genetically engineered mutant lizard that can't change color yet grows larger and more powerful.
|skill=
|hp=1772
|def=180
|atk=290
|rush=198
|gene1=In Zombie or Mutant Forms, {race} ATK +120
|gene2=When in Zombie or Mutant Forms:
> Gain +6% Cells in explorations
|gene3=Earth DMG +90
|gene4=Each round, {race} ATK +60
|gene5=Rebel Cabin, deployable robots +3
|gene7=Rebel Cabin, deployable robots +9 (Awakened)
|}}
